₹100.name: Windowed Security Thread
₹100.description: Colour shift from green to blue when tilted. Contains 'Bharat' and 'RBI'.

₹200.name: Windowed Security Thread
₹200.description: Colour shift from green to blue when tilted. Contains 'Bharat' and 'RBI'.

₹200.name: Colour Shifting Ink
₹200.description: Denominational numeral 200 changes from green to blue.

₹200.name: H-Symbol for Visually Impaired
₹200.description: Raised printing of Mahatma Gandhi portrait, Ashoka Pillar emblem, raised Identification mark H with micro-text ₹200, four angular bleed lines with two circles in between the lines.

₹500.name: Windowed Security Thread
₹500.description: Colour shift from green to blue when tilted. Contains 'Bharat' and 'RBI'.

₹500.name: Colour Shifting Ink
₹500.description: Denominational numeral 500 in lower right changes from green to blue.

₹500.name: Circle Symbol for Visually Impaired
₹500.description: Raised printing of Mahatma Gandhi portrait, Ashoka Pillar emblem, circular identification mark with microtext ₹500 on the right, five angular bleed lines on both the left and right sides.

₹2000.description: Colour shift from green to blue when tilted. Contains 'Bharat' and 'RBI' and '2000'.
